sys_script_include.description: Client callable function for getting the form preferences set for a task 2.7.0 | 2021-11-16 | raj | STRY0113838 - Tasker Settings- Allow for custom "URL Suffix" for Tasker Portal - chagned this function and moved from ClientTaskInfo: taskGetTaskSysId() to taskGetRedirectURL
sys_script_include.name: client_tasker_User_Form_Preferences
